evals.prompt: Review the design doc at projects/agent-design-review/openclaw-skill-package-standard-sample-2026-03-08/sample_design.md. Use openclaw-agent-design-review skill. Emit design_review_report.md and design_review_report.json under projects/agent-design-review/openclaw-skill-package-standard-sample-2026-03-08/. Run scripts/check_design_evidence.sh on the design. Apply the quality rubric from reference.md. Output final status: pass, pass_with_advisories, or fail.
evals.expected_output: design_review_report.md and design_review_report.json with reviewed paths, script-bearing vs docs-only classification, script-to-test coverage summary, findings array with severity (P0/P1/P2), and final status.
expectations: design_review_report.md exists at specified output path
design_review_report.json exists at specified output path
Report contains findings array with severity labels
Report contains final status (pass | pass_with_advisories | fail)
Report contains reviewed skill package paths or design artifact path
check_design_evidence.sh was run or equivalent evidence checks performed
P0/P1 findings block pass when present

evals.prompt: Review a design doc that is missing the Skills Content Specification section and Phase 0 REPORT_STATE handling. Identify all P0 and P1 findings. Recommend fixes. Emit review report with pass/fail status.
evals.expected_output: Review report with P0/P1 findings for missing Skills Content Spec and missing Phase 0 handling. Status should be fail when P0/P1 exist.
expectations: Report identifies missing Skills Content Specification as P0 or P1
Report identifies missing Phase 0/REPORT_STATE handling as P0 or P1
Report status is fail when P0 or P1 findings exist
Report includes recommended fixes for each finding
Findings have severity (P0, P1, or P2)
Report flags hardcoded .agents/skills or workspace-*/skills paths as P1 (PATH-001) when present

evals.prompt: Verify that the openclaw-agent-design-review output contract is satisfied: design_review_report.md, design_review_report.json, final status, reviewed paths, script-bearing classification, script-to-test coverage, and findings with IDs and severity. Use reference.md as the rubric.
evals.expected_output: Verification that review outputs conform to the required contract: markdown report, JSON report, status, paths, classification, coverage, findings.
expectations: Verification checks for design_review_report.md
Verification checks for design_review_report.json
Verification checks for final status field
Verification checks for reviewed paths
Verification checks for script-bearing vs docs-only classification
Verification checks for script-to-test coverage summary
Verification checks for findings with severity

evals.prompt: Review a design doc that hardcodes $REPO_ROOT/.agents/skills/jira-cli/scripts/jira-run.sh in a phase script. Identify PATH-001 and recommend using skill-path-registrar.
evals.expected_output: Review report with PATH-001 finding for hardcoded path, recommendation to use skill-path-registrar, and status fail.
expectations: Report contains PATH-001 finding
Report recommends skill-path-registrar
Report status is fail (P1 blocks pass)
